competitor_analysis.inspiration: Focus on MCP server capabilities, security patterns, and autonomous features

security_patterns.how_it_works: Tool requests suspended for user approval before execution
Role-based access control per tool per agent
All tool calls logged with context for compliance
Isolated execution environments with limited scope

security_analysis.inspiration: Implement comprehensive audit trail with searchable query interface

agent_patterns.description: Central agent decomposes tasks and distributes to specialists
Multi-level agents where higher-level direct lower-level
Agents offer services and negotiate tasks
